seo.title: Cocktail Menu — Craft Bar Program | Louisiana Purchase North Park
seo.description: Louisiana Purchase's French Quarter-rooted craft cocktail program in North Park, San Diego. Superbird Palomas, Watermelon Margaritas, and Hurricane Pops — bold, playful, unforgettable.
seo.schemaDescription: Louisiana Purchase's French Quarter-rooted craft cocktail program in North Park, San Diego.

hero.title: Cocktails
hero.subtitle: A French Quarter-rooted bar program. Superbird Palomas, Watermelon Margaritas, Hurricane Pops — bold, playful, unforgettable.
hero.imageAlt: Three signature cocktails on the patio at Louisiana Purchase North Park San Diego

menuHeader.title: Cocktails Built for
menuHeader.subtitle: Every cocktail is rooted in New Orleans tradition — complex, ceremonial, and built with the same precision as the kitchen.

cta.title: Reserve a Seat at the Bar.
cta.subtitle: Happy Hour runs Monday – Friday, 3 PM – 5 PM. The full cocktail menu is available open to close, seven days a week.
